versions.version_description: Drop D tuning. Capo for original key of recording. Makes it a lot easier to play this song.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Mississippi in the middle of a dry spell[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Jimmy Rogers on the Victrola up high[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Mama's dancin' with baby on her shoulder[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
The sun is settin' like molasses in the sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]                               [ch]C#[/ch]
The boy could sing, knew how to move, everything[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#[/ch]
Always wanting more, he'd leave you longing for...[/tab]
------------------------------------------------------
CHORUS:
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]               [ch]C#[/ch] 
Black velvet and that little boy's smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]
Black velvet with that slow southern style[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                      [ch]C#[/ch]
A new religion that'll bring ya to your knees[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A#[/ch]     [ch]D#[/ch]
Black velvet if you please... [/tab]
------------------------------------------------------
VERSE:
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Up in Memphis the music's like a heatwave[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
White lightening, bound to drive you wild[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Mama's baby's in the heart of every school girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
"Love me tender" leaves 'em cryin' in the aisle[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]                               [ch]C#[/ch]
The way he moved, it was a sin, so sweet and true[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#[/ch]
Always wanting more, he'd leave you longing for...[/tab]
------------------------------------------------------
CHORUS:
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]               [ch]C#[/ch] 
Black velvet and that little boy's smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]
Black velvet with that slow southern style[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                      [ch]C#[/ch]
A new religion that'll bring ya to your knees[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A#[/ch]     [ch]D#[/ch]
Black velvet if you please... [/tab]
------------------------------------------------------
BRIDGE:
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                   [ch]A#[/ch]                             [ch]D#m[/ch]          
Every word of every song that he sang was for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                  [ch]C#[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]D#[/ch]   
In a flash he was gone, it happened so soon, what could you do?[/tab]
------------------------------------------------------
GUITAR SOLO:
Em (like intro)
------------------------------------------------------
